aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some structured content and a focus on local services, but lacks comprehensive optimization and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve trust signals.
Optimize meta tags and headings with targeted local keywords (e.g., 'HVAC services in Gilbert, AZ').
Enhance the website's mobile responsiveness and page load speed.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes UTM parameters in the URL, indicating some understanding of tracking marketing efforts.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged Google Business Profile (GBP) opportunities, as there are no reviews or GBP-specific optimizations evident.
critical_issues: No active GBP listing or reviews, which are crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of GBP posts or updates to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website, but there is no evidence of consistent citations across directories.
action_items: Audit and ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and update profiles on major local business directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages).
Incorporate structured citations with schema markup to enhance local SEO.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for services and customer interactions (e.g., reviews, ratings).
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local searchers and potential customers who rely on reviews and detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement review schema and service-specific schema to improve search engine understanding.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Create and publish high-quality, locally-focused content (e.g., blog posts on HVAC tips for Arizona homeowners) to establish expertise and improve search rankings.

page_title: Around the Sun Heating & Cooling | Heating & Cooling Company
